## What's Changed

- Rebuilt Activity as a dedicated Tater/VCR-style playback log and removed the old NZB queue and import interface from that tab.
- Records what played, which Tater Tube player played it, its source, when it played, and how long it was watched.
- Shows playback position, live status, bytes served, transcode profile, codec, and the active hardware acceleration engine.
- Tracks Local, NZB Stream, and Tube TV playback with stable Tube TV sessions.
- Persists recent playback activity in the server database so history survives container restarts.
- Fixed Tube TV commercials to always use the server-managed metadata library at `/config/metadata/tube-tv-commercials`.
- Removed the obsolete editable commercial storage path from server configuration.

## Player Compatibility

Tater Tube Player v1.5.6 is recommended for the matching bordered Tube TV channel overlay.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

The playback-history database migration runs automatically. Existing commercial uploads remain in the server metadata directory.
